{{Quote|The shaper's arts cannot help you, I am certain, because the one force in the universe more powerful than those arts afflicts you. The will, the anger of the gods is what you suffer.|Ghithra Dal, to Tsavong Lah|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''</ref>}}
'''Ghithra Dal''' was a member of the [[Shaper caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A [[Master Shaper]], Dal was assigned to oversee the grafting of [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]'s new [[radank]] forearm. However, the arm continued to rot, and Dal could supply no reason for this. In truth, he was sabotaging the arm, so that he and [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] [[Takhaff Uul]] could control the Warmaster. Tsavong Lah, however, was already suspicious thanks to [[Viqi Shesh]], and when [[Nen Yim]] discovered that the arm was sabotaged, Lah decided to take vengeance. On the shaper vessel [[Fu'ulanh]], Dal was killed by [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]] that Tsavong Lah unleashed into the vessel.
